title: GregTech Steam Expansion
description: Steam-powered tools & armor addon for GregTech CEu Modern with special abilities.
body:
# GregTech Steam Expansion

**Expand the Steam Age with powerful steam-powered tools and armor!**

GregTech Steam Expansion is an addon for **GregTech CEu Modern** that introduces a complete suite of steam-powered equipment, bringing new life to the early-game Steam Age progression.

---

## Features

### Steam-Powered Tools

Experience mining and crafting like never before with 8 unique steam-powered tools:

#### Basic Tools
- **Steam Pickaxe** - Features **Vein Mining**: automatically mines entire ore veins (up to 16 blocks) when powered by steam. Hold Shift to mine single blocks.
- **Steam Axe** - Efficient wood harvesting tool
- **Steam Shovel** - **3x3 Excavation Mode**: dig large areas quickly when powered by steam
- **Steam Sword** - Combat weapon powered by steam
- **Steam Hoe** - **3x3 Tilling** and **Auto-Harvest**: right-click mature crops to harvest and replant automatically

#### Advanced Tools
- **Steam Drill** (32,000 mB capacity)
  - **3x3 Area Mining**: breaks a 3x3 area of blocks
  - Perfect for large-scale excavation projects
  - 50 mB steam consumption per block

- **Steam Chainsaw** (32,000 mB capacity)
  - **Instant Tree Felling**: chops entire trees at once (up to 200 blocks)
  - Makes forestry efficient and satisfying
  - 30 mB steam consumption per block

- **Steam Hammer** (24,000 mB capacity)
  - **50% Chance for Double Ore Output** when powered by steam
  - Right-click blocks to transform: Stone → Cobblestone → Gravel → Sand
  - 40 mB steam consumption per block

### Steam-Powered Armor

Protect yourself with a full set of steam-powered armor, each piece offering unique benefits:

- **Steam Helmet** (8,000 mB capacity)
  - Grants **Night Vision** when powered by steam
  - Never lose sight in dark caves again

- **Steam Chestplate** (64,000 mB capacity)
  - **Large Steam Storage** - acts as the main steam tank for your armor set
  - **Jetpack Functionality**: Hold Space to fly up to 10 blocks high (50 mB/tick)
  - Press the Jetpack Toggle key to enable/disable flight mode
  - Crouch while falling to glide gracefully

- **Steam Leggings** (16,000 mB capacity)
  - **Increases Movement Speed** when powered
  - **Immunity to Slowness** effects

- **Steam Boots** (8,000 mB capacity)
  - **No Fall Damage** when powered by steam
  - **Step Assist**: automatically climb blocks like a horse



---

## Steam Mechanics

All steam-powered equipment operates on a dual-system:

**With Steam:**
- Tools consume steam instead of durability
- Enhanced performance and special abilities activate
- Smooth, efficient operation

**Without Steam:**
- Tools consume durability like normal items
- Special abilities are disabled
- Still functional but less efficient

**Refueling:**
- Use the **Steam Charging Station** to refuel your equipment
- 9 charging slots for simultaneous refueling
- 512,000 mB (512 buckets) steam tank capacity
- Smooth charging at 25 mB per tick

---

## Steam Alloy Material

Introducing **Steam Alloy** - a unique material designed specifically for steam technology:

**Properties:**
- Crafted from 2 Bronze + 1 Steel
- Tool tier: 2 (Iron equivalent)
- Durability: 512
- Mining speed: 7.0

**Crafting Methods:**
- **Alloy Smelter**: Bronze Ingots + Steel Ingot → Steam Alloy Ingots
- **Mixer**: Bronze Dust + Steel Dust → Steam Alloy Dust

---

## Steam Charging Station

A dedicated machine for refueling your steam-powered equipment:

- **9 Charging Slots**: charge multiple items simultaneously
- **512 Bucket Steam Tank**: large capacity for extended operation
- **Smooth Charging**: 25 mB per tick for quick refueling
- **Auto-Detection**: only accepts steam-powered items
- **User-Friendly GUI**: clear steam level display and item organization

---


## Technical Information

**Requirements:**
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.4.4+
- **GregTech CEu Modern 7.0.0+** (required)

**Optional Integration:**
- Just Enough Items (JEI) 15.20.0+ - for recipe viewing


---

## Support & Links

- **GregTech CEu Modern**: [Official Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtechceu-modern)

---

**Embrace the power of steam and revolutionize your GregTech experience!**
